LanguageData.FB_ColonyBrain_Structure_FleshHoldingPla: Secures captured entities with vascular restraints. It has slightly stronger containment than a steel holding platform and consumes more hemogel while occupied.
LanguageData.FB_FleshHoldingPlatformContainmentToolti: Adjusts the platform's containment strength from its current room-based minimum ({0}) up to the selected target ({1}). Current effective strength: {2}. Current hemogel consumption: {3}/h.
LanguageData.FB_FleshHoldingPlatformCopySettingsDesc: Copy this platform's containment-strength slider setting. This does not copy hemogel.
LanguageData.FB_FleshHoldingPlatformPasteSettingsDesc: Apply the copied containment-strength slider setting to the selected flesh holding platforms. This does not change hemogel.
LanguageData.FB_FleshHoldingPlatformPasteSettingsUnav: No containment settings have been copied.
LanguageData.FB_FleshHoldingPlatformLinkSettingsDesc: Link the selected flesh holding platforms so they share one containment-strength setting.
LanguageData.FB_FleshHoldingPlatformLinkSettingsNeedT: Select at least two flesh holding platforms on this map.
LanguageData.FB_FleshHoldingPlatformUnlinkSettingsDes: Give the selected platforms their own containment-strength settings.
LanguageData.FB_FleshHoldingPlatformUnlinkSettingsUna: This platform is not linked to a settings group.
LanguageData.FB_FleshHoldingPlatformSelectLinkedDesc: Select every flesh holding platform linked to this platform.
